item.title: About
item.description: Who I am a husband and father of two. I am an engineer, entrepreneur and computer scientist. I was born in France in the early 1980’s. Too long ago already. Where I live in Lausanne, Switzerland. I also lived and worked in France, in Vietnam, in Malaysia and in the U.S. I have been working remotely or with distributed teams for 15+ years. What When I wasn’t busy teaching my kids how to use a glue gun, I have been managing tech organizations, mostly building or turning them around.

item.title: Calendar
item.description: I use a service called Calendly to give secure access to my calendar. Click here to open it and book a call.

item.title: Home
item.description: If you landed on this page, then we probably are connected in some way. Mention your discovery next time we meet in person and I’ll buy you a drink. Or some chocolate. If we meet in France or Switzerland, definitely go for the chocolate. Until then, take care of yourself and the ones you love. Best, ML

item.title: LinkedIn
item.description: Click here to go to my LinkedIn profile page.

Cette page présente les personnalisations que j’ai apportées à mon environnement de bureau pour m’aider à mieux supporter l’exposition aux écrans d’ordinateur malgré mon hypersensibilité à la lumière. Système d’exploitation J’ai quitté le monde Windows en 2009 pour Linux, et plus précisément Xubuntu, dont je suis extrêmement satisfait. Avec quelques connaissances informatiques, Linux permet de personnaliser à peu près n’importe quel détail de l’expérience utilisateur, en particulier l’apparence. C’est particulièrement pratique lorsque l’on vit avec une déficience visuelle.
There is one rule, above all others, for being a man. Whatever comes, face it on your feet. ― Lan, in The Great Hunt, book 2 of The Wheel of Time by Robert Jordan
